holdings.infoBox: PXE is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are Valero Energy stock at 5.36%, Marathon Petroleum at 5.29%, Diamondback Energy at 5.09%, EOG Resources at 5.07%, and Devon Energy at 5.05%.

overview.description: The Invesco Energy Exploration & Production ETF (PXE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund tracks an index of U.S. energy exploration and production companies selected and weighted by growth and value metrics. PXE was launched on Oct 26, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: Dynamic Energy Exploration & Production Intellidex Index (AMEX)

data.title: How To Find The Best Sector ETFs 1Q24
data.text: With an ever-growing list of similar-sounding ETFs to choose from, finding the best is an increasingly difficult task. How can investors change the game to shift the odds in their favor?

data.title: 7 Energy ETFs to Buy
data.text: Energy stocks and exchange-traded funds (ETFs) were a popular bet heading into 2022. So far, so good – the sector has been by far and away the best performer in the young year.
